svg.text: Which file each command fires, what it does, and how every artefact is connected — one schematic, end to end.
— seven buttons, in the order you press them · all with ENV=dev
runs the job: open log → DLT
row flow, dim keys, fact grain,
grey arrows = data flow · coloured chip = the command that builds/triggers that part
ON YOUR LAPTOP (WSL) · pure Python, no workspace
↺ make clean — deletes these local files (.local/ · synthetic_universe.db · caches)
make load · databricks fs cp -r → landing Volume
make run ▸ databricks bundle run vic_suburbs_job — the job that builds the medallion above
dlt_entry.py loops every entity → bronze.py · silver.py · gold.py
PROVISIONED FIRST — by make bootstrap (which also runs make deploy as its step 3)
the six layer schemas it creates:
row flow · unique SKs · fact grain · zero orphans · views OK
make verify reads the built result (01 → 05)
the make command that builds / triggers that part
make clean / make destroy reset zones
